chain.thought: Explanation: The table shows a three-year cycle with readings divided into Year 1, Year 2, and Year 3, and the example years repeat every three years (e.g., Year 1 includes 2013, 2016, 2019, 2022). This indicates the same verses are read again after 3 years.

judge_thought: Explanation: The header shows a three-year cycle: Year 1 includes 2013, 2016, 2019, 2022; Year 2 includes 2014, 2017, 2020, 2023; Year 3 includes 2015, 2018, 2021, 2024. Since the same verses are associated with a specific year category, they recur every three years (e.g., 2013 → 2016 → 2019 → 2022). Therefore, it takes 3 years to read the same verses again.
